reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for each HP bar module and crop the shared atlas into separate enemy and player widgets.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_hp_bars_dual_440x32.png through AssetServer during HUD setup and slice the atlas into two 220x32 regions.
runtime_notes: Enemy bar anchors to top-right and player bar anchors to bottom-right inside the same safe margin.
Runtime fill amounts animate inside the authored channels without scaling the frame art.
Numeric text can overlay the socket region with no further frame swap.

context.usage: Shared atlas for the enemy top-right HP bar and the player bottom-right HP bar with numeric sockets.

shape.silhouette: Two horizontal framed bars with left label pads and right numeric sockets.

specs.lighting: Cream highlights sit on the bar rims while fill channels stay flat for clear value reads.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas frame is exactly 440x32 px and contains two 220x32 bar modules side by side.
Enemy fill channel uses crimson and player fill channel uses emerald with identical inner padding.
Numeric sockets remain at least 44 px wide so three-digit values fit without clipping.
